qwen-local.baseUrl: REPLACE_ME: Qwen OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. http://HOST:PORT/v1
qwen-local.apiKey: REPLACE_ME: api key if your endpoint requires one; any non-empty string if it does not

models.id: REPLACE_ME: Qwen model id served by your endpoint, e.g. Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct
models.name: Qwen (local)
